messages.content: Ein Gebäude wird so geplant, dass sich gleichzeitig 120 Personen darin aufhalten können. Es ist davon auszugehen, dass sich gleich viele Männer wie Frauen im Gebäude befinden und die Toiletten kontinuierlich benutzt werden. Wie viele weibliche Sitztoiletten, männliche Sitztoiletten und Urinalstände?

In response to your inquiry about the number of toilets required for a building accommodating 120 people, with an equal distribution of men and women, we can refer to the OIB Guidelines, specifically OIB-RL 3 (Hygiene, Health, and Environmental Protection) and ÖNORM B 1600 (Barrier-Free Construction). According to these regulations, the minimum number of sanitary facilities must be calculated based on the total occupancy. For a mixed-gender occupancy of 120, it is generally recommended to provide at least one toilet for every 10 persons. Therefore, for 60 women, a minimum of 6 female toilets is required, while for 60 men, at least 6 male toilets should be provided. Additionally, it is advisable to include urinal stands for men, typically at a ratio of 1 urinal for every 5 male occupants, suggesting at least 12 urinal stands. This ensures compliance with hygiene standards and accessibility requirements outlined in the OIB Guidelines and ÖNORM standards.
